revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_hatnote_templates here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_hatnote_templates for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Navbox
| name = Category hatnote templates
| state = {{{state|<includeonly>expanded</includeonly>}}}
| bodyclass = hlist
| belowclass = hlist
| title  = [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|Hatnote]] templates for [[Wikipedia:Categorization|category pages]]

|group1 = About
| list1 = 
*{{tl|Category explanation}}
*{{tl|Category main article}}
*{{tl|Category main section}}
*{{tl|Main category}}
*{{tl|Category more}}
*{{tl|Category more if exists}}

|group2 = See also
|list2=
*{{tl|Category see also}}
*{{tl|Category see also if exists}}
*{{tl|Category see also if exists 2}}
*{{tl|Category pair}}
*{{tl|Preceding category}}
*{{tl|Succeeding category}}

|group3= Distinguish
|list3=
*{{tl|Category distinguish}}
*{{tl|Category contrast}}

| below =
*[[Wikipedia:Hatnote#Categories|Outline]]
*{{Icon|cat}} [[:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]]
*See also [[Template:Other category-header templates|other category-header templates]]

}}<noinclude>
{{Navbox documentation}}
<!-- Please add categories at the bottom of this page, and interwikis at Wikidata (see Wikipedia:Wikidata) -->

[[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]]
[[Category:Documentation see also templates]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
